headline: Verano Announces 1-for-5 Reverse Stock Split to Prepare the Company for Prospective U.S. Stock Exchange Listing
summary: Reverse Stock Split builds on prior strategic initiatives the Company has executed to prepare for future growth and U.S. capital markets opportunities, including completing the redomiciling of Verano Holdings Corp. from British Columbia, Canada, to the U.S. state of Nevada in November 2025Verano’s active operations span 13 states, comprised of 162 dispensaries and 14 cultivation and processing facilities with more than 1.1 million square feet of cultivation capacity CHICAGO, June 01, 2026 (GLOBE
